data.title: Gala Games reduces prices on Byte Boost Bonanza bundles, giving gamers better chances to improve their virtual villages.
data.description: Gala Games has just revealed a substantial reduction in prices for Byte Boost Bonanza bundles. This move provides gamers with better chances to enhance and expand their virtual villages. The price drop is set to make a notable impact, offering a more attractive option for players looking to level up their gaming experience.

data.title: Global Finance & Technology Network (GFTN) launches Global Impact Champions Awards in Singapore, focusing on Financial Health.
data.description: In Singapore on August 2, 2025, the Global Finance & Technology Network (GFTN) introduced the first-ever Global Impact Champions Awards focusing on Financial Health for the year 2025. This initiative aims to recognize FinTech startups that offer scalable solutions to enhance individuals' financial well-being.

data.title: Boost Python Data Science Efficiency with 7 GPU-Enabled Tools for quicker analysis and training. Check out cuDF, cuML, and cuGraph for optimal results.
data.description: Learn how to speed up Python data science tasks by incorporating GPU-accelerated libraries such as cuDF, cuML, and cuGraph. This enables quicker data processing and model training, enhancing efficiency and productivity significantly. Implementing these libraries can lead to a notable increase in speed and performance, making tasks smoother and more effective. Explore how utilizing these GPU-accelerated libraries can optimize data science workflows and drive better results in data processing and model training.

data.title: EIGEN price plunges to $1.08, down 3.75% amid bearish trend despite multi-chain launch success and RSI at 34.68.
data.description: The price of EIGEN has dropped by 3.75% to $1.08, reflecting ongoing weakness as technical indicators suggest. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 34.68. This decline comes despite a recent advancement in multi-chain verification technology.

data.title: LayerZero (ZRO) price stays at $1.70 amid limited 24h movement due to token unlock pressure, despite oversold indicators.
data.description: Currently, ZRO is being traded at a price of $1.70, showing minimal movement over the past 24 hours. The selling pressure resulting from the major token unlock that occurred in July continues to impact the price as it remains low. This is the case despite the technical oversold conditions.

data.title: NVIDIA boosts AI model efficiency with post-training quantization (PTQ), improving performance using formats like NVFP4.
data.description: NVIDIA has introduced post-training quantization (PTQ) to enhance the efficiency and performance of AI models. This technique utilizes formats such as NVFP4 to improve inference without the need for retraining. By implementing PTQ, NVIDIA aims to boost the effectiveness of AI models significantly.

data.title: VET trades at $0.02, stays stable amid slight 24h dip; key support levels tested, technicals show neutral momentum.
data.description: The price of VET remains stable at $0.02, despite a minor 24-hour decrease. Technical indicators indicate a neutral momentum, with critical support levels being tested.

data.title: JasmyCoin (JASMY) price hits $0.01, down 1.82% with RSI at 41.51, hinting at oversold conditions.
data.description: The price of JASMY has decreased by 1.82% to $0.01, nearing crucial support levels. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 41.51, suggesting the possibility of impending oversold conditions.

data.title: FTX Token (FTT) defends $0.90 level amid $16.5B creditor repayment momentum, technical indicators mixed.
data.description: The price of FTT remains steady at $0.90 following a period of fluctuation, with conflicting signals from technical indicators. The recent announcement of the $16.5 billion FTX creditor repayment plan is bolstering the fundamental support for the cryptocurrency.

data.title: CAKE tests $2.58 support after 28% rally, trades -1.86% at $2.58 with $2.31 support and RSI at 47.69. Possible consolidation ahead.
data.description: The cryptocurrency CAKE is currently trading at $2.58, which reflects a decrease of 1.86% from the previous day. This follows a significant breakout observed last week. Key support for CAKE is identified at $2.31. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 47.69, indicating a neutral stance and hinting at a possible upcoming consolidation phase for the asset.

data.title: Tezos price falls 3.34% to $0.74 despite strong bullish setup, but indicators hint at a possible reversal.
data.description: Tezos (XTZ) is currently valued at $0.74, reflecting a 3.34% decrease. However, technical analyses point towards a possible turnaround, as the Relative Strength Index (RSI) hovers in neutral territory and the price remains steady above crucial support thresholds. This indicates a potential shift in market sentiment for Tezos.

data.title: Investment firm ARK Invest purchases $30M in Coinbase & $17M in BitMine stocks on Friday during market downturn.
data.description: On Friday, ARK Invest made significant investments in the cryptocurrency market. They allocated $30 million towards purchasing shares of Coinbase and $17 million towards acquiring shares of BitMine. These purchases were made during a period of price declines in both assets.

data.title: Consumers now feeling impact of tariffs as prices rise after delay, showing effects of President's levies.
data.description: There are increasing indications that the tariffs imposed by President Trump are starting to impact consumer prices, as companies are running out of strategies to maintain stability amidst the situation.

data.title: Will Trump's tariffs help reduce economic inequality? Despite aiming to protect workers, trade barriers may not bring back factories or close income disparities.
data.description: The president is targeting his trade policies towards workers who have been negatively impacted by globalization. However, it is important to note that implementing trade barriers may not necessarily lead to the revival of factories or bridge income disparities.

data.title: Oddly-shaped lots could aid housing crisis as more U.S. cities allow building on irregular plots amid escalating needs.
data.description: With increasing demands, numerous cities and states in the U.S. are simplifying the process of constructing on unconventional and previously neglected properties.

data.title: ENS price dips to $25.25 (-2.55%) despite high exchange outflows after a 60% surge caused by 250K token withdrawals.
data.description: The Ethereum Name Service is currently trading at $25.25, experiencing a 2.55% decrease as bulls take a break after a significant 60% increase in the previous week. This surge was fueled by 250,000 token withdrawals from exchanges.

data.title: Avast named top cybersecurity software by Software Experts, recognized as the best antivirus in August 2025.
data.description: In New York on August 2, 2025, the growing importance of strong, multi-platform cybersecurity solutions was emphasized due to increasing digital threats and reliance on personal devices. As a response to this, Avast was awarded as the Best Antivirus by Software Experts. This recognition highlights the significance of reliable cybersecurity in today's tech-driven world.

data.title: GitHub plans to phase out GPU machine type in Codespaces by August 2025 due to Azure retiring NCv3-series VMs. Developers advised to prepare for the change.
data.description: GitHub has revealed plans to retire GPU machine types in Codespaces by August 29, 2025, aligning with Azure's NCv3-series VMs phaseout. This move necessitates developers to make necessary preparations for the forthcoming transition.

data.title: Filecoin (FIL) price plunges to $2.30 after breaking crucial $2.38 support, with RSI at 36.42 indicating bearish momentum.
data.description: Shares of FIL are currently trading at $2.30, reflecting a 1.33% decrease in value following a break below a significant support level. Key technical indicators suggest a bearish trend, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 36.42 and the price approaching the lower limits of the Bollinger Bands. These metrics point to negative momentum in the market.

data.title: Celestia's TIA now at $1.62 (-2.35%) from failed $2.16 resistance breakout. Foundation buys $62.5M tokens, new upgrade reduces inflation by 33%.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TIA is currently trading at $1.62, which reflects a daily decrease of 2.35%. This drop comes after a failed breakout above resistance levels. Despite this, the Foundation has made a significant purchase of tokens worth $62.5 million. Additionally, there is excitement surrounding the upcoming Lotus upgrade, which is expected to reduce inflation by 33%. These developments have generated interest in the cryptocurrency's future performance.
